arts.ttl: Bundesliga manager huge fan of Leeds United star; wants his club to sign him this summer
arts.sum: Leeds United loanee Rasmus Kristensen is having a fantastic season at Eintracht Frankfurt, sparking speculations about his long-term future. Kristensen joined the German club on loan last summer and has since done excelled under Dino Toppmoller. The versatile right-back has made 29 appearances across all competitions for the club, scoring 1 and assisting 2. He […] The post Bundesliga manager huge fan of Leeds United star; wants his club to sign him this summer appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Leeds v West Brom: Referee confirmed
arts.sum: Leeds United host West Brom this Saturday afternoon looking to temporarily extend their lead at the top even further after Monday night’s memorable win. Hallam has yet to referee Leeds or West Brom in his career, having worked his way up the FA ranks to come into the Championship this season, most recently taking charge of Hull City’s 1-0 win at Sunderland last weekend, where Joe Gelhardt’s corner was turned into his own net by Anthony Patterson.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke shares Leeds United stance on Manor Solomon, Joe Rothwell permanent deals
arts.sum: The two loan players at Elland Road this season, Manor Solomon and Joe Rothwell, represent more realistic deals to broker in the summer, given they are likely surplus to requirements at Tottenham and Bournemouth respectively. The remaining 12 games of this Championship season are what is dominating Daniel Farke’s view at the moment, but he no doubt has already considered whether the club should secure permanent deals in the summer for Rothwell and Solomon.

arts.ttl: Major Leeds United and Wales blow as Ethan Ampadu injury verdict given
arts.sum: Leeds United boss Daniel Farke has issued an update on Leeds captain Ethan Ampadu

arts.ttl: Watch: Moyes baffled by horror Harrison moment away from Leeds
arts.sum: Leeds United have been left frustrated at Jack Harrison’s decision to leave the club twice in a row on loan through a clause in his contract, but he’s not enjoying his form at Everton this season. Harrison’s output has been a massive issue in Everton colours this season, but it hasn’t stopped new boss David Moyes overhauling their form and seeing the Toffees right up the table.

arts.ttl: EFL confirm Championship play-off dates as Leeds United set sights on title glory
arts.sum: Dates have been confirmed for this season's Championship play-offs as Leeds United look to avoid the end-of-season extravaganza. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community

arts.ttl: Wales will be without injured Ethan Ampadu for opening World Cup qualifiers
arts.sum: The 24-year-old defender or midfielder was out for 10 weeks earlier in the season with a knee injury.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke addresses Angus Kinnear exit links and plans for Leeds United loan stars
arts.sum: Daniel Farke refused to be drawn into the speculation surrounding Angus Kinnear’s future as CEO of Leeds United but says it is a good sign that rival clubs are interested in their personnel. Farke has refused to comment on the reports but says the rumours show the club is doing something right.

arts.ttl: Ampadu 50-50 chance of playing this season, plus frustrating Bamford update
arts.sum: Leeds United captain Ethan Ampadu has been given a 50-50 chance of playing again this season, while they will be without Patrick Bamford for even longer than expected. Leeds team news: Ethan Ampadu 50-50 for season-ending injury
